race.comment: TRANSCELTIC (3) fought on well for second last start over 1400m at Charleville, making it two minor placings in a row. Gets some well-needed weight relief with the 3kg claim. Well placed and should be in the finish again. HIGHGROUND (6) raced on the pace last start before fading to finish seventh, beaten 9 lengths, over 1000m at Emerald. Has a solid record here at the distance with two wins and two placings from five tries. Sure to run well. TOKYO SINS (5) was in the money two starts back at Alpha but was unable to repeat the effort last time when sixth, beaten 2.25 lengths, at Barcaldine over 1200m. Rock-hard fit now and is sure to be thereabouts. RUBUNKAR (7) finished out of the money two starts back then was beaten 4.5 lengths when ninth over 1200m at Barcaldine two weeks ago after being in contention on the corner. Likely improver with strong top-three prospects.
